headline: OPSEU/SEFPO slams Ford's spending priorities after another provincial budget leaves public services behind — along with Ontarians who rely on them
summary: Toronto, ON, March 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- For the eighth consecutive year, the Ford government has unveiled a provincial budget designed to slowly suffocate the public services Ontarians depend on, says the Ontario Public Service Employees Union (OPSEU/SEFPO). “Year after year, we are offered short-sighted spending plans which prioritize Doug Ford’s vanity projects instead of addressing service cuts and staffing shortages,” said JP Hornick, President of OPSEU/SEFPO. “Workers, students, and

headline: Will GM's $600M Korea Push Ease Exit Worries for Good?
summary: General Motors' $600 million Korea bet will upgrade plants and boost small SUV output, easing near-term exit fears even as EV production plans remain unclear.

headline: New York International Auto Show Announces 2026 Press Conference Schedule
summary: The New York International Auto Show has released the official schedule for its 2026 press preview, outlining three days of industry announcements, executive discussions, and media events at the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center in Manhattan, New York.

raw.headline: New York International Auto Show Announces 2026 Press Conference Schedule
raw.summary: The New York International Auto Show has released the official schedule for its 2026 press preview, outlining three days of industry announcements, executive discussions, and media events at the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center in Manhattan, New York.

headline: Mercedes-Benz CEO talks EV Strategy, future cars
summary: Ola Källenius is a Swedish business executive who has served as CEO of Mercedes-Benz since 2019, becoming the first non-German to lead the legendary luxury automaker. Kallenius joined Opening Bid Unfiltered with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to chat about the future of the auto industry, his decision to massively increase the AMG brand's presence, leaning into tech-heavy car interiors, and playing a role in a driverless-car future.

raw.headline: Mercedes-Benz CEO talks EV Strategy, future cars

headline: Mercedes-Benz CEO Defends Bold EV Strategy
summary: Mercedes-Benz CEO, Ola Källenius, sits down with Yahoo Finance executive editor Brian Sozzi to dive into Mercedes’ “all-of-the-above” strategy, the realities of global EV adoption, and why stepping back from electrification now could be a costly mistake. Källenius also shares how the company is positioning itself for long-term leadership in innovation for both electric and performance vehicles.

headline: 22 S&P 500 Stocks Yield More Than 5%. 6 That Are Worth Buying.
summary: The key is choosing the winners from the losers by focusing on dividend coverage—the cash flow and earnings needed to cover the payouts—and the potential for improving businesses.

headline: Morgan Stanley names top auto pick if gas prices stay high
summary: For car buyers, 2025 was a year of opportunity and crisis as the prospect of higher prices due to tariffs drove a record number of buyers to dealer lots in the first half of the year.
